Application Tips
01
🧹
Clean the Surface
Remove all dust, loose material, oil, grease, and old coatings. The substrate must be structurally sound. Any cracks should be repaired before application.
02
💧
Wet the Surface
Pre-wet the wall thoroughly with clean water before plastering. This prevents the substrate from absorbing water from the render too quickly, which causes shrinkage cracks.
03
🪣
Mix Correctly
Mix MC Render powder with clean water to a consistent workable paste. Use approximately 5–6 litres of water per 25 kg bag. Avoid adding extra water after initial mixing.
04
🏗️
Apply Evenly
Apply the render in one consistent thickness using a steel trowel. Work in sections to maintain a wet edge. Typical application thickness is 8–12 mm for MC Render.
05
✨
Finish the Surface
While the render is still fresh, use a textured float or sponge to achieve the desired marble chips texture. Work in circular or cross motions for an even finish.
06
🌊
Cure with Water
After finishing, mist the surface with clean water 2–3 times daily for at least 2–3 days. Proper curing prevents cracking and ensures maximum strength and durability.
07
☀️
Avoid Direct Sun & Wind
Do not apply in direct sunlight, strong wind, or extreme heat. These conditions cause rapid drying which leads to surface cracking. Work in the cooler morning or evening hours.
08
⏱️
Allow Full Cure Time
Allow a minimum of 7 days full curing before applying any topcoat or sealer. In humid UAE conditions, 10–14 days is recommended for best adhesion of any subsequent coating.
